home_about_heading: The heart of Mongolian sport since 1958
home_about_body: The National Stadium of Mongolia, founded in 1958, was the country's first national-scale stadium. For decades it has served as the principal stage for major matches of the national teams, international competitions, and large cultural events. Today we are expanding into a modern complex with 12,500 seats and capacity for up to 25,000 spectators, committed to delivering world-class services to the public.
home_about_cta_lead: Discover our history, mission, and plans for the future.
footer_copyright: © 1958–2026 National Stadium of Mongolia. All rights reserved.
footer_tagline: Mongolia's center for sports, culture, and celebration — where champions are born and every moment becomes a memory.
footer_address: Stadion Orgil - 2, Mahatma Gandhi Street, 15th Khoroo, Khan-Uul District, Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia

home_roadmap_1958: Built with support from the People's Republic of China
home_services_subtitle: The core focus of the National Stadium of Mongolia and the services we provide to the public.
home_services_card1_desc: The National Stadium organizes major national and international events and performances, and rents out its venue to the public and partner organizations.
home_services_card2_desc: Browse the laws, rules, and regulations relevant to citizens, organizations, and our day-to-day operations.
home_services_card3_desc: Stay up to date with our activities, upcoming events, and the latest announcements — all in one place.
home_services_card4_desc: Send us suggestions, feedback, or general inquiries and receive a quick response from our team.
home_services_card5_desc: Watch live performances, competitions, and events at the stadium through our 360° cameras, right on this website.
home_partners_subtitle: The Central Stadium has successfully collaborated with leading Mongolian enterprises and international organizations on long-term development projects throughout the year, consistently enhancing sports and public event facilities. Their trust is the cornerstone of our growth, innovation, and commitment to delivering high-quality services to the public.
home_services_card6_desc: Founded in 1958, with 12,500 seats and capacity for up to 25,000 spectators — Mongolia's flagship complex and a central stage for sport, culture, and public events.
events_intro_body: Our stadium is equipped with modern, standards-compliant grounds and production gear designed to host every kind of event — sporting competitions, cultural performances, and large public gatherings. We provide end-to-end support to make every event a success.
events_intro_capacity_1_rest: ready to host major national and international events.
events_intro_capacity_2_rest: spacious grounds suitable for festivals, sports, concerts, shows, and every type of gathering.
events_intro_capacity_3_rest: dedicated stadium-owned parking surrounding the venue.
events_intro_advantage_2: Large seating capacity with flexible event configurations
events_intro_advantage_3: Full audio and lighting production support
events_intro_advantage_4: Modern parking and infrastructure on site
events_intro_advantage_6: Single-point pre-event preparation and post-event support
events_intro_included_8: On-site sales and service coordination (on request)
events_page_heading: Upcoming concerts, sporting events, and cultural gatherings at National Stadium
history_page_subtitle: Brief biographies of executive directors, founders, and key figures who shaped the history of the Central Stadium.

legal_law_arhiv: Law on Archives and Records Management
footer_years_copyright: © 1958–2026 National Stadium of Mongolia. All rights reserved.
about_intro_lead: THE CENTRAL STADIUM WAS BUILT IN 1958 WITH THE SUPPORT OF THE PEOPLE'S REPUBLIC OF CHINA, CONSTRUCTED WITH A MIX OF REINFORCED CONCRETE AND BRICK. THE CENTRAL CANOPY WAS FULLY COMPLETED BY THE MONGOLIAN SIDE IN 1971. IT HAS A TOTAL SEATING CAPACITY OF 12,500 AND A STANDARD FIELD MEASURING 105 × 68 METERS.
about_intro_body: In 2014 the old wooden benches were replaced with individual plastic seats with backrests. Every year during Naadam, the stadium and its surroundings come alive with festival crowds. In 2024 it was reorganized into the locally-owned «Central Stadium» LLC and continues to grow with renovations, additional seating, an indoor running track, new outdoor walkways and a children's playground.
about_vision_text: To build a new stadium that meets international standards for hosting Mongolia's National Naadam Festival, cultural, artistic and sporting events.
about_mission_text: Modernize equipment and infrastructure to create a comfortable, safe, and satisfying environment for our visitors; assemble a skilled and dedicated team; and become a modern stadium meeting international standards.
about_ach_1_desc: Capable of hosting major national and international events.
about_ach_2_desc: A suitable venue for festivals, sports, concerts, shows and all kinds of events.
about_ach_3_desc: Our own parking areas surrounding the stadium.
about_director_heading: Central Stadium — a symbol of national unity. A space that will always remain open and dignified for you.
about_director_quote: DEAR CITIZENS, ON BEHALF OF THE CENTRAL STADIUM TEAM, I AM PROFOUNDLY HAPPY TO EXTEND MY WARMEST GREETINGS TO ALL OF YOU.
about_director_body_1: Central Stadium is a place of pride and a symbol of unity for the Mongolian people. For many decades we have successfully hosted national sporting competitions, cultural and artistic events, and built a space that has become the heartfelt expression of the people.
about_director_body_2: Today we are working to improve our operations to meet the demands of a new era, striving to create a more open, accessible and citizen-friendly environment. Our mission is to contribute to nurturing healthy, resilient and thoughtful citizens, and together build a strong and creative society.
about_director_body_3: Central Stadium is not merely a closed venue that opens only for festivals and concerts — it will be a public complex open to citizens every day, offering opportunities to grow together, find joy, and gain inspiration. We are committed to creating conditions where everyone can exercise, take part in cultural events, and spend quality time with family and friends.
about_director_body_4: We can only achieve all of this with your trust, support and collective participation. We strive to provide higher-quality, more accessible services based on mutual understanding, cooperation, and innovation.
about_director_body_5: On behalf of our team — who unite their hearts and efforts to contribute to the development of Mongolian sports, culture and arts — I sincerely thank our valued visitors, partner organizations and collaborators.
about_director_closing_1: Central Stadium — a symbol of national unity.
about_director_closing_2: A space that will always remain open and dignified for you.
about_history_heading: A legacy built by generations of leaders
